name: opus-pack
description: Home of the Opus Pack plugins: distilled operating skills for daily-driver Claude models - few dense rules, executable gates over long prose, measured against their own doctrine with the nulls published.

plugins.name: opus-pack
plugins.description: Nine agent-discipline skills: operational-rigor, delegation-and-review, ground-truth-gates, cross-model-review, skill-authoring, security-architect, product-roadmap, personal-goal-planning, domain-evidence-discipline. Hooks stay manual-install by design (per-user consent).

plugins.name: design-pack
plugins.description: Three design-craft skills: ui-design-craft, motion-craft, design-review-gate. Domain doctrine in the opus-pack style - numeric budgets, prohibited patterns, observable gates; the design-contract evidence rules live in design-review-gate. Installable separately; designed to run alongside opus-pack. Registers no hooks.
